examples: Critics viewed him as a reactionary, even a monarchist.
A monarchist party is running in the forthcoming elections.
One of those sentenced to death was said to be a member of a pro-monarchist group.
Indeed, the monarchist army chief, General Rookmangud Katwal, this week struck a jarring note.
The powerful people in the military and monarchist camps who are used to running Thailand do not like this.
